name: adb-connect
description: Pair and connect an Android device to ADB over Wi-Fi by scanning a QR code from the terminal. Mirrors Android Studio's 'Pair devices using Wi-Fi' flow: generates a Wi-Fi QR code in the terminal, discovers the device via mDNS when the user scans it from Developer options, then runs adb pair and adb connect automatically. Cross-platform via Node.js (no Python required).
